title: Aaron Taylor-Johnson
content:
{{Actor |image = Aaron Taylor-Johnson.jpg |DOB = June 13, 1990 |movie = ''[[Captain America: The Winter Soldier]]''
''[[Avengers: Age of Ultron]]'' |character = [[Quicksilver|Pietro Maximoff/Quicksilver]]}} '''Aaron Perry Taylor-Johnson''' portrayed [[Quicksilver|Pietro Maximoff/Quicksilver]] in ''[[Captain America: The Winter Soldier]]'' and ''[[Avengers: Age of Ultron]]''. ==Trivia== *Aaron Taylor-Johnson previously worked with [[Elizabeth Olsen]] in ''{{WPS|Godzilla (2014 film)|Godzilla}}''. *Aaron Taylor-Johnson worked again with [[Callan Mulvey]] in ''{{WPS|Outlaw King}}''. *Aaron Taylor-Johnson worked again with [[Ben Davis]] in ''{{WPS|Kraven the Hunter (film)|Kraven the Hunter}}''. *Aaron Taylor-Johnson portrayed {{WPS|Kraven the Hunter|Sergei Kravinoff/Kraven the Hunter}} in the [[Sony Pictures Entertainment]] production ''{{WPS|Kraven the Hunter (film)|Kraven the Hunter}}''. *Aaron Taylor-Johnson shares his birthday with [[Stellan Skarsgård]], [[Kat Dennings]], [[Chris Evans]], [[Fred Tatasciore]] and [[Ogie Banks]]. ==Credits== Aaron Taylor-Johnson Credit - Age of Ultron.png|''[[Avengers: Age of Ultron]]'' ==External Links== *{{WP}} *{{IMDb|1093951}} [[Category:Actors]] [[Category:Captain America: The Winter Soldier Actors]] [[Category:Avengers: Age of Ultron Actors]] [[Category:Actors with Roles in Comic Book Adaptations outside the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]
